tenantCustom.title: UI Customization
tenantCustom.noTenantSelected: Select a tenant above to configure its UI settings.
tenantCustom.showWelcomeModalHelp: Show the welcome modal to users who haven't dismissed it.
tenantCustom.showInfoIconsPagesHelp: Show the ⓘ info button on individual pages (e.g. Create Invoice).
tenantCustom.showInfoIconsReportsHelp: Show the ⓘ info button on individual report cards.
tenantCustom.directLabelHelp: Short label shown on the filter button on the Customers page. Default: "Direct".
tenantCustom.customerGroupLabel: Direct customer type — dropdown group header
tenantCustom.customerGroupLabelHelp: Full label shown as the group header in the customer dropdown on the Payments page. Default: "Direct customers".
tenantCustom.showOrderSelectionHelp: Allow linking a payment to a specific order.
tenantCustom.visiblePaymentTypesHelp: Choose which payment types are available for this tenant. All are visible by default.
tenantCustom.showPartnerTransfer: Show P to P transfer & payment
tenantCustom.showPartnerTransferHelp: Show Partner-to-Partner transfer and debt payment buttons on the Partner detail page. Off by default.
tenantCustom.showOrderNumberHelp: Display the order number column in the orders list.
tenantCustom.showCostEffectivenessHelp: Display cost effectiveness metrics on the dashboard.
tenantCustom.requiresApprovalHelp: Time entries require manager approval before being finalized.
tenantCustom.serviceTypeLabelHelp: What a single booking service is called, e.g. "Session", "Lesson".
tenantCustom.bookingProviderNameHelp: Display name of the connected booking provider.
tenantCustom.showBookingParticipantsHelp: Show participant management for group bookings.
